creator: jbr@idiom.com
text:
Running Netscape 4.05-linux works fine on a kernel with no
	USER_LDT.  Using a kernel with USER_LDT, Netscape 4.05-linux
        runs, eats lots of CPU time, and never displays a window.

Fix: 

Not known.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Run Netscape 4.05-linux under a kernel that has USER_LDT 
        enabled.
